entry.title: 计谱原理（一）基础知识回顾与含时薛定谔方程
entry.content:
10-1

假设 \(\mu\)为常数，关于不同取值的S作 \(\alpha-S\)图 ![[作业10-1.png]] ## 10-2 \[\begin{align*}P|m\rangle&=-i\sqrt\frac{\omega}{2}(a-a^\dagger)|m\rangle\\&=-i\sqrt{\omega/2}(\sqrt m|m-1\rangle-\sqrt{m+1}|m+1\rangle)\\&=-i\sqrt{ \frac{\omega}{2} }(\sqrt{ m }\ket{m-1} -\sqrt{ m+1}\ket{m+1} )\end{align*}\] \[\begin{align*}[\hat H,Q]|m\rangle&=\sqrt{ \frac{1}{w}}([\hat{H},a^{\dagger}]\ket{m}+[\hat{H},a]\ket{m}) \\&=\sqrt{ \frac{1}{2\omega} }(\omega a^{\dagger}\ket{m} -\omegaa\ket{m} )\\&=\sqrt{ \frac{2}{\omega} }(a^{\dagger}-a)\ket{m} \\\end{align*}\] 得证： \[\begin{align*}\hat{P}_{nm}=(i[\mathcal{H},\hat{Q}])_{nm}\end{align*}\]

entry.title: test
entry.content:
1

\[ egin{align} ra{g} \eta \ket{n} ^{*} imes ra{g} \eta \ket{n} &= ra{g} (\coskr+i\sin kr) abla\ket{n} ^{*} imes ra{g} (\cos kr+i\sin kr) abla\ket{n}) \&= ra{g}\cos kr abla \ket{n} imes ra{g} \cos kr abla \ket{n}+ ra{g} \sin kr abla \ket{n} imes ra{g}\sinkr abla\ket{n}+i ra{g} \cos kr abla \ket{n} imes ra{g} \sinkr abla \ket{n} -i ra{g} \sin kr abla \ket{n} imes ra{g} \coskr abla \ket{n} \&=2i ra{g} \cos kr abla \ket{n} imes ra{g} \sin kr abla\ket{n}\A^{2}_{0}i\hat{\epsilon_{3}}\cdot[ ra{g} \eta \ket{n} ^* imes ra{g}\eta \ket{n} ]&=A^2_{0}i\hat{\epsilon_{3}}\cdot 2i ra{g} \coskr abla \ket{n} imes ra{g} \sin kr abla \ket{n} \&=-2A_{0}^{2}\mathrm{Im} ra{g} e^{ -ikr} abla_{\hat{\epsilon}}\ket{n} ra{g} e^{ ikr} abla_{\hat{\epsilon}}\ket{g}\&=\Delta ECD\end{align}\] # 2 \[ egin{align}\mathcal{H}'_{2}(t)&= rac{1}{2}(\hat{A_{1}}\cdot\hat{A_{1}}+\hat{A_{2}}\cdot\hat{A_{2}}+\hat{A_{2}}\cdot\hat{A_{1}}+\hat{A_{1}}\cdot\hat{A_{2}})\\end{align}\] 其中， 只有 \(\hat{A}_{1}\cdot\hat{A}_{2}+\hat{A}_{2}\hat{A}_{1}\) 有意义 \[ egin{align}A_{1}=\sqrt{ rac{2\pi}{\omega_{1} V} }\hat{b_{1}}e^{ -2\omega_{1} t }\A_{2}=\sqrt{ rac{2\pi}{\omega_{2} V}}\hat{b_{2}} e^{ -2\omega_{2} t }\end{align}\] \[ egin{align}\mathcal{H'_{(2)}}(t)&= rac{1}{2}(A_{1}\cdot A_{2}+A_{2} \cdotA_{1} ) \& = rac{2\pi}{ \omega_{1} V}(\hat{b_{1}^2e^{ -4\omega_{1}t }})\end{align}\] \[ egin{align}\mathcal{H'}_{(2)}(t) & =\hat{A_{1}}\cdot\hat{p}+\hat{A_{2}}\cdot \hat{p} \& =2\sqrt{ rac{2\pi}{V\omega_{1} } }(\hat{p} \hat{b_{1}}e^{-i\omega t})\end{align}\]
